case_title: JANNES HUEHNERBEIN VS. CITY GARDENS BRIDGE LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $140) SERVED JAN-06-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PINNACLE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUEHNERBEIN, JANNES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINNACLE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LLC $8,539.05 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,754.05, DEFENDANT PINNACLE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PAYMENT SHALL BE MADE BY WIRE TRANSFER TO PLAINTIFF HUEHNERBEIN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-15-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF JANNES HUEHNERBEIN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT CITY GARDENS BRIDGE LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PINNACLE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CINDI WANG (REGIONAL PROPERTY MANGER). PLAINTIFF ORALLY STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
